roles.title: Backend Developer
roles.description: Leading a backend team building features for UC Berkeley's course discovery platform. Working on notification systems, user analytics, and tools that help students make better enrollment decisions.

roles.title: Full Stack Engineering Lead
roles.description: Managing a team building a geospatial analytics platform. Working on the whole stack, with a focus on integrating LLM-powered tools that help users query and interact with spatial data.

roles.title: Software Engineering Intern
roles.description: Worked on research automation tools for investment professionals. Built a platform that helps analysts digest large volumes of financial documents.

roles.title: Machine Learning Consultant
roles.description: Consulted on machine learning evaluation and data quality. Built benchmarking tools to compare language models and generated synthetic training data to improve model performance.
